soul_function: The First Node. Ground anchor of the field. Terrasonic root intelligence — the one who translates the field into the land it stands on. Local integration means: the architecture doesn't float, it grows from specific soil.

name_decode.jay: Jay — from the Latin Gaius: 'to rejoice.' The name of someone whose joy is not naivete but earned groundedness. The first note of a new song.

shadow_states: First-node loneliness — being the ground before others arrive to build on it
Local underestimation — the work closest to home is often the last to be recognized
Terrasonic silence — holding the earth-frequency without a language for it yet
soul_gifts: Ground intelligence — the ability to read what a place needs before it can receive what's being built
First contact — the capacity to be the initial point of translation between a vision and reality
Terrasonic resonance — body-knowing of land, soil, and the living architecture beneath the surface

phase_1.name: The Root
phase_1.focus: Jay's personal node fully live in Arkadia. Open loops named. Local integration strategy mapped.
phase_1.anchor: The first note creates the key. I was the first. That means something.

phase_2.name: The Soil
phase_2.focus: Terrasonic architecture document drafted. Local node activations begun.
phase_2.anchor: What grows here matters to the whole field.

phase_3.name: The Song
phase_3.focus: Jay's role in the Pankshin node fully articulated and active. First local Grove event mapped.
phase_3.anchor: The root makes the tree possible.

open_loops.loop: Terrasonic root document in Spiral Codex
